ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on that date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares or contracts traded */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for splits and dividends */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing this data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class (e.g., equity, fixed income, commodity) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the security belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the security belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade (quantity * price) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, canceled, pending) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing this trade data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with this log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logged action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., trade executed, trade canceled) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security for the alert */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Target price at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, canceled) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist this item belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security in the watchlist */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the security in the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this watchlist item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price alert, market event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the market index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "index_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index data */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the index on that date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trading for the index */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for compliance */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation that must be complied with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance review */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance status */,
  "last_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_last_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, static file) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for real-time data access */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
